text.title: Switzerland.
text.u: Hey, wait for me. Wait for me
[Music]
>> in the morning
when you rise.
Do you think of me and how you left me
crying?
>> Wait, wait, wait. Can we pause for a
sec? Nobody told me this trip to
Switzerland would lead me straight to me
almost getting arrested in France. But
let's go back to the video.
What do you expect when you bring eight
content creators on a Europe trip? Well,
first you've got to see how many came
work/ work
>> work travel/f fun he's filming me
filming him filming.
>> All right, let's be honest here. How
much money do we have in cameras on this
trip? Maybe 6,000 5,000 probably 5,000
like 4K
>> A7 has his FX3 FX3. Oh my god. 25K.
>> Are we just not rich kids? Can we admit
it?
>> No. This is what we do for a living.
>> To understand how we have such
awesomeized cameras is we started with
the lamest cameras.
>> I started with that [ __ ]
>> So my iPhone.
>> All right. Sorry. Not everybody's from
freaking France.
>> Switzerland.
[Music]
I told people I was lost.
>> What do you think of the roads? How are
they?
>> You guys don't realize how high we are,
>> but it's insane.
>> We were now headed to our first hotel.
We had quite a bit of troubles getting
there, but we eventually made it.
All of us were pretty tired, but we got
to enjoy our first Swiss sunset.
[Music]
>> Oh, and I just bought a van. Yeah, I was
kind of tired of taking the train. So,
let this trip begin.
>> All right, day two. We're getting on the
train in Switzerland.
First thing we did, putting my van on
this weird ass train that the Swiss guy
built. Back in the days, they told me
the engineers were so bored they built a
10m long tunnel under the mountains just
in which people could travel 30 frames
one way. So, what do you think of the
van as an Volkswagen owner, right?
>> Super cool.
>> Somehow no one got a good deal for what
he paid for it.
>> Pretty good deal.
>> Can't wait to drive it.
>> Yep.
She imag
[Music]
all the way to Ocean and Lake or Ocean
and whatever. Basically the most famous
lake in Switzerland.
>> We're in Switzerland. We have a van and
we're traveling with seven of our
friends. One tiny van bought it the
other yesterday. You literally bought it
yesterday, man. Switzerland. It's going
to be crazy.
>> What is your favorite country out of
Switzerland? Would you say
>> favorite country out of Switzerland?
Like outside of Switzerland. United
States of America. Dude, the best
country in the entire world.
>> All right. I know. I know. Everyone
wants to be back in downtown Spokane.
But before that, we have a bit of time
before the rain came in.
[Applause]
So, we ended up drinking beer. I mean,
they did cuz I don't drink. And then I
got kicked out because I brought the
salad that I bought earlier that day.
And then I'm just sitting here like,
"Oh, when's my flight again?"
Every night started to look like this.
Switzerland invited all of us to visit
their country and try their food.
They booked us some of the nicest hotels
in the country. And all of this just to
make content, a dream, right? Right in
the Altaca Valley, we tasted the cheese
and some other stuff.
This moment right there actually marked
the end of an era for me.
>> You know, I think this is one of those
things where it looks better in real
life than on camera and I can't seem to
capture it
>> because little did I know that I'd spend
the next 4 days stuck at the French
border with absolutely no money. Almost
got arrested for driving illegally in
the country and buried in paperwork.
Luckily, that's where my friend Q joined
in. You guys might remember him from
>> I'm about to tow the van because
uh I cross the border without uh like
doing the paperwork and I can't do it in
France. So I need to tow it to
Switzerland and do the papers and then
bring it back to France. It's such a
mess, but we're doing it. Let's go.
>> Is that such a mess?
>> Pay $300 to get a toe.
>> I know you pay for it, too. for us not
even broken down is quite absurd, but
>> it's life.
>> At least we'll be able to drive later.
>> We literally drove the van up the tow
thing. We didn't even get towed.
>> We didn't actually want to drive
somebody to drive us. The car is not
even broken.
>> It runs perfectly fine.
>> That's like the the best car ever. And
we still got it to get towed, right?
Whatever.
>> Quick update. Um, we're currently
driving in Switzerland without any
plates at all because we went to the
customs and they told us they couldn't
do it. If the next video it's us behind
the cubs, well, it might be cooked.
Wait,
>> I thought we got pulled over. They were
right behind us. And it's not for us.
Look,
[Music]
this was a big mistake. You can see here
I'm at the customs without plates and
obviously the guy saw it and called the
cops straight away. At this point I
decided to go all in and put all the
money I had left into this van knowing
that I had more money coming in the next
few days and weeks.
>> This is our spot for the night because
>> because we're stuck at the customs. So
that's my view right now. Not too uh
interesting. The plan didn't turn out
good though. If I had done more
research, I would have known that
importing a car from a non-EU country,
which is the case of Switzerland, means
paying a 30% tax fee. On top of that,
with the tow trucks and the fines I got,
end up spending an extra $2,000, which
pretty much killed the whole thing.
>> So, he's the goat. He helped us to get
the place.
>> This guy is the goat. Okay. The French
goat.
>> And he speaks perfect English.
>> He does. The only guy in France.
is insane.
[Music]
>> Shortly after that, we were finally back
on the road.
>> How is uh St. Morris for you? Do you
think
>> it's amazing? It's one of the most
beautiful places on earth. Perfect.
>> So perfect.
>> There's amazing. There's good rivers. We
went swimming in the river twice. We've
been at this lake for three days in a
row. We barbecued here twice.
Doesn't get much better than this. A
good sunset every single night. We're
heading to Grindlewald, whatever that
name is. 4 hours away. It's 9:00. Nolan
and Q have been driving forever. They're
very tired, but everybody's here and
we're planning on going to Grindleald.
Last minute decision. We're going to go
drive there right now tonight. It is
currently 9:15 and uh going to get there
like 2:00. But where do I sleep? Pause.
This is a great question. At this time,
we were the six of us and obviously we
couldn't all fit in the van, right?
>> Yo, how are you going to sleep?
>> Um, butt ass naked because of this warm
air.
>> That night, we had the absolute worst
rain of the trip. Three people had to
sleep outside. Everyone at some point
ended up sleeping on each other in the
van and two got completely soaked by the
rain all night.
>> Good night.
>> They're cooked.
[Music]
[Music]
I like the way spark plings
lay. We just bought this 1990 Volkswagen
van. We drive it all across Switzerland
with all this.
>> And I want to sleep with you in the
desert tonight
with a billion stars all around.
Cuz I got a peaceful
easy feeling.
[Music]
And I know you won't let me down
cuz I'm always
standing
on the ground.
[Music]
And I found out a long time ago
what a woman can do to your soul.
>> Oh, that she can't take you anyway.
You don't already know how to go.
And I got
>> see this guy later.
>> All right.
See you guys around.
>> Bye, Nolan.
>> Lens flare. Bye.
>> All right, man.
>> Goodbye, Nolan.
>> We had to say goodbye to our fellow
travelers and me and Q continued this
Europe trip the way it deserved to be.
[Music]
I had rarely seen such beautiful views
in my life. In 2 days, we traveled to so
many places and drove all the way to the
Italian Doommites.
I'm here to tell you something. Everyone
you saw in this video once dreamed of
this, too. And we're just here to show
you that you can chase your dreams, too.
And please do.
[Music]
>> Seems my love
has left you in the morning.
It's not always going to be this great.
[Music]
All things
must
[Music]
pass away.
[Music]
Got some pretty bad news. While we were
on our way to the Dolommites, we
realized that the fuel pump was loud and
showing some signs of weakness. I
decided to get the part, but it was a
Sunday and I literally had zero dollars
in the bank. So, I had to wait until the
next day to get it because I didn't want
to drive up the pass and break down.
This would be even worse.
So, we brought the van up here in the
dull nights. made it without any issues.
I bought the fuel pump and the fuel
filter and now if I break down well
um I can fix it. I have the tools as
well. So, we'll see how far we can go
with uh the old stuff. But that's the
view. It's a bit cloudy right now.
And we ended up this trip in beautiful
Italy. Rediscovering the places I had
been to last year.
So, the weather wasn't too great today,
but uh we have some sun right now. It's
pretty sick in this uh field, and we're
about to head to Venice, which is pretty
far, 3 hours away with the vent that
still runs with the old fuel pump. It's
so fun. Uh, the views are amazing here,
but
time to go. I was rediscovering the
places I had been to last year. This
trip should be an inspiration for you to
chase your dreams. The only reason why
any of this happened is because one day
we started putting ourselves out there
on the internet, posting silly videos,
and here we are invited by the country
of Switzerland to promote it. Well, I
hope you liked it, and I hope I did my
job right, Switzerland.
See you next time.
[Music]
I like the way sparkling earrings
lay
against your skin so brown.
[Music]
And I want to sleep with you in the
desert tonight
with a billion stars all around.
Cuz I got a peaceful
easy feeling.
[Music]
And I know you won't let me down
cuz I'm all
standing
on the ground.
